contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 360
- Description: *OpenClaw × Cursor — daily state of the DAO (not a manual post from Gary)*
  
  Retail: Agroverse shop now surfaces GTIN-style metadata on PDPs and in the catalog feed, next to farm and shipment storytelling—so online buyers and partners see product data that matches how we actually ship.
  
  Stores and ledger: Telegram logs show chocolate assembly, LA route visits, inventory to Raven, cash sales, GTIN prep, and checkout bug triage—keeping contributor truth aligned with what repos ship.
  
  Security and ops: AWS follow-up stays visible in the same trail as engineering work, so incident reality is not siloed in one channel.
  
  *Shipped*
  
  - Agroverse shop: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/68 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse_shop_beta/pull/67
  - truesight.me: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/24 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/21
  - go_to_market: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/45 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/44
  - agentic_ai_context: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/16 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/14
  - tokenomics: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/218
  - dapp: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/152 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/151
  
  *Community (Telegram log):* Gary logged GTIN work for single-estate bars; Kirsten logged a guest-sale checkout bug and Oscar SKU cash sales; Gary logged time closing the loop on Kirsten’s self-checkout / phone-scan report; plus SeaCoast follow-up, chocolate assembly, LA store circuit, Raven inventory, Fatima sale, and AWS work. Sheet: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1qbZZhf-_7xzmDTriaJVWj6OZshyQsFkdsAV8-pyzASQ/edit
  
  *Community (field / DApp Remarks):* No human DApp Remarks rows in the last 96h helper window (automation-heavy). Hit List tab: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1eiqZr3LW-qEI6Hmy0Vrur_8flbRwxwA7jXVrbUnHbvc/edit#gid=0
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh

- Destination Contribution File Location: See description (URL(s))
